title: Candy Weapons
body:
# A candy themed resource pack!




This pack changes:

## Swords

Netherite Sword: Pez Dispenser


![Candy Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cZHrXEd8/images/0dd37507ec53c2c7c3ac439020db64300849b9d3.png)

Diamond Sword:  Popsicle

![Candy Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cZHrXEd8/images/61a02e4c0e0813f3975a3a3d2d6e8d39eef70db9.png)

Iron Sword: Pocky Stick

![Candy Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cZHrXEd8/images/bdb4baa3ad7c0c865956d1febc5dec34bd4b5a92.png)


Stone Sword: Dream Pez Dispenser

![Candy Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cZHrXEd8/images/fd460aa06a1c7cb7f10e32190ef85c7c42eb0061.png)

Wooden Sword: Kit Kat

![Candy Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cZHrXEd8/images/2b1f9795f73c074fabb69a650606ba8d018686df.png)


## Axes

Netherite Axe: Red Pringles Can

![Candy Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cZHrXEd8/images/8d1435f88c86c97e59ad44eb081838e4dc025e33.png)

Diamond Axe: Blue Pringles Can

![Candy Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cZHrXEd8/images/cf21be67815b8729f5fc732b724098ab0208bbd7.png)

Iron Axe: Ice-cream Bar

![Candy Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cZHrXEd8/images/99d63bb9dfd01ade6f21500e4a95222ed088945f.png)

Stone Axe: Gray Pringles Can

![Candy Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cZHrXEd8/images/a77ee3e7bec88f4ef85e1132f32ea72025e6893b.png)

Wooden Axe: Brown Pringles Can

![Candy Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cZHrXEd8/images/5de7d6df917a85b9964fb3b801fc0453ddf78275.png)

## Misc.

Totem: Lollipop

![Candy Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cZHrXEd8/images/202b8eebe07b7b1206d4c8be3d52f03db6cc3c99.png)

Fishing Rod: Candy Cane

![Candy Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cZHrXEd8/images/77572a46179eb2567e729156aa40eacf342d48d4.png)

Snowball: Red Gummy Bear

![Candy Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cZHrXEd8/images/f231bc5a8d093a9312af2e4bc51926bf10803dfa.png)

And a secret item you will have to find out in game!


Enjoy!


**DISCLAIMER
THIS RESOURCE PACK MAY NOT WORK ON CERTAIN SERVERS AS THEY MIGHT HAVE THEIR OWN RESOURCE PACK THAT MIGHT OVERIDE THIS ONE**
